title: Application of Artificial Intelligence in Supply Chain Management - Opportunities and Challenges, a Workshop Report
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has progressed significantly and impacted various aspects of our daily life.
text:
Kulvatunyou, B. , Charoenwut, P. and Mai, Y.
